summary: The diff implements all four required fixes: REQ-1 (admin session persistence via localStorage in AuthContext, removal of auth error messages), REQ-2 (ServiceForm with retry logic, backend submitOrder optimization, success state), REQ-3 (base64 data URL photo/document display in AdminDashboard, OrderTracking, Receipt), and REQ-4 (Accept/Reject buttons wired to updateOrderStatus with inline success/error messages). All four requirements appear substantially addressed.
